articles.description: The Middle East war and a photo Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor with Jeffrey Epstein and Peter Mandelson dominate Saturday's front pages.
articles.title: Newspaper headlines: Epstein files photo 'bombshell' and 'Iran war spirals'

articles.description: The Tories are deciding which hereditary peers to keep after being offered 15 seats in a compromise deal.
articles.title: Doomed hereditary peers spy chance to stay in the Lords

articles.description: Rachel Reeves says the Treasury is also looking at "different options" to help households most vulnerable to soaring energy bills.
articles.title: Chancellor to offer support over rising heating oil costs

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: From mourning the life they no longer have to feeling never-ending pressure, women tell the BBC why they regret becoming mothers.
articles.title: 'A trap you can't escape': The women who regret being mothers

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Independent retailer Goran Raven says the higher oil price is "horrific" for him as well as his customers.
articles.title: 'We're not profiteering on fuel. But my staff still face abuse'

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Dame Sarah Mullally's six-day walk begins at Southwark Cathedral and travels along the Becket Way to Canterbury Cathedral.
articles.title: New archbishop of Canterbury to undertake six-day pilgrimage

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Critics say Xi's purges reveal a ruthless drive for absolute loyalty and total control of the military.
articles.title: Xi Jinping: Why is the Chinese leader's anti-corruption drive still going on?

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Scientists say nearly all of the significant glaciers in the Austrian Alps have shrunk.
articles.title: Austrian glaciers disintegrating due to climate change, say scientists

articles.description: Sir Laurie Magnus said the relevant process appeared to have been followed when Lord Mandelson was made ambassador.
articles.title: Ethics adviser rejects Tory call for inquiry into PM over Mandelson appointment

articles.description: F1 Academy wants to nurture and develop female drivers who can compete at motorsport’s top level
articles.title: How F1 Academy women are trying to break motorsport's male stronghold
